original text:
Home | SIDELINE Construction, Inc.
Servicing all of Monroe, Wayne, and Ontario Counties. Fully Insured.
We always take great care with every homeowners house, property, and plantings.
We have windows custom made to a fraction of an inch to fit each particular opening.
We make recommendations to improve the value and look of each and every home.
"I am thoroughly thrilled with the siding job. I didn't know or realize how much was involved with re-siding until I had the pleasure of watching Sideline Construction work on our house. While I may have questioned why things were done a certain way, to which I would always receive a lay person response, I never questioned the work. As you said to me "We never get call backs. I can truly understand why. The craftsmanship, ability to think outside the box when faced with challenges , the work ethic, friendliness, courtesy, cleanliness and attention to detail is why I am thrilled with my house and will recommend Sideline Construction to friends. Thank you for transforming my house into a jewel."
When roofing a home, Sideline Construction always takes great care with the homeowners house and plantings. We cover and protect the house and the plantings. Sideline offers 30 year, 50 year and lifetime warrantied roofing products.
Sideline Construction's main focus for windows is on the vinyl replacement market. We have windows custom made to a fraction of an inch to fit each particular opening. We install top quality windows from Thermal Industries, one of the leading window manufactures in the world.
Sideline Construction has been siding homes for 17 years. We do exclusively vinyl siding. Over the years the siding market has come out with some great options for the homeowner that does not like the look of vinyl.

Army Criminal Investigation Command -- Officials and employees -- Fiction | Brothers -- Fiction | Nuclear terrorism -- Fiction | Murder -- Investigation -- Fiction | Conspiracy -- Fiction | Puller, John (Fictitious character) -- Fiction | West Virginia -- Fiction Genre/Form: Suspense fiction. | Detective and mystery stories.DDC classification: 813/.54 Summary: Combat veteran John Puller, now working as an investigator for the Army's Criminal Investigative Division, tries to solve the murder of an Army man and his Pentagon contractor wife in their isolated rural home.
